message:
bd-1av0.3: implement node:crypto shim with real crypto hostcalls

Replace the non-cryptographic djb2 stub with proper Rust-backed crypto:
- New src/crypto_shim.rs: 5 hostcalls (hash, hmac, uuid, randomInt, timingSafeEqual)
- Supports sha256, sha512, sha1, md5 algorithms via sha2/sha1/md-5/hmac crates
- JS module with fallbacks: createHash, createHmac, randomUUID, randomBytes, randomInt, timingSafeEqual, getHashes
- 20 tests verifying Node.js-compatible output (all pass)
- Deps added: sha1, md-5, hmac, getrandom

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
